label: CQ1 — Tropical Cyclone events with related incidents
CQ2 — Flash Flood / Riverine Flood events by location & region
CQ3 — Mudslide type hierarchy & event counts per level
query:
PREFIX :     <https://sakuna.ph/>
PREFIX org:  <https://sakuna.ph/org>
PREFIX skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#>
PREFIX prov: <http://www.w3.org/ns/prov#>
PREFIX xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX qudt: <http://qudt.org/schema/qudt/>
PREFIX cur:  <http://qudt.org/vocab/currency/>

SELECT ?ancestor ?ancestorLabel (COUNT(DISTINCT ?event) AS ?eventCount)
WHERE {
    :Mudslide skos:broader* ?ancestor .
    OPTIONAL { ?ancestor skos:prefLabel ?ancestorLabel }
    OPTIONAL { ?dt skos:broader* ?ancestor .
               ?event a :DisasterEvent ;
                        :hasDisasterType ?dt }
}
GROUP BY ?ancestor ?ancestorLabel
ORDER BY DESC(?eventCount)

label: CQ4 — Volcanic subtypes affecting Regions III, V, VI
CQ5 — Fire / Transport / Armed Conflict events in 2022 (C. Luzon & CALABARZON)
query:
PREFIX :     <https://sakuna.ph/>
PREFIX org:  <https://sakuna.ph/org>
PREFIX skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#>
PREFIX prov: <http://www.w3.org/ns/prov#>
PREFIX xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX qudt: <http://qudt.org/schema/qudt/>
PREFIX cur:  <http://qudt.org/vocab/currency/>

SELECT ?eventType ?region (COUNT(DISTINCT ?event) AS ?eventCount)
WHERE {
    VALUES ?dtypes { :FireIndustrial :FireMiscellaneous :Wildfire :Transport :ArmedConflict }
    VALUES ?targetRegions { :0300000000 :0400000000 }
    ?event  a            :DisasterEvent ;
            :startDate   ?startDate ;
            :hasLocation ?location ;
            :hasDisasterType ?eventType .

    ?location     :isPartOf* ?targetRegions .
    ?targetRegions rdfs:label ?region .
    ?eventType     skos:broader* ?dtypes .

    FILTER (YEAR(?startDate) = 2022)
}
GROUP BY ?eventType ?region
ORDER BY DESC(?eventCount)

label: CQ6 — Displaced families & persons in Western Visayas
CQ7 — Ground Movement casualties by province (CAR)
CQ8 — Evacuation centers for Tropical Cyclone in CALABARZON 2021
query:
PREFIX :     <https://sakuna.ph/>
PREFIX org:  <https://sakuna.ph/org>
PREFIX skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#>
PREFIX prov: <http://www.w3.org/ns/prov#>
PREFIX xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX qudt: <http://qudt.org/schema/qudt/>
PREFIX cur:  <http://qudt.org/vocab/currency/>

SELECT ?source (SUM(?evacCount) AS ?total)
WHERE {
    ?event  a            :DisasterEvent ;
            :hasDisasterType ?dtype ;
            :hasPreemptiveEvacuation ?pevac ;
            prov:wasDerivedFrom/prov:wasAttributedTo ?source .

    ?dtype    skos:broader* :TropicalCyclone .
    ?location :isPartOf*   :0400000000 .
    ?pevac    :hasLocation  ?location ;
              :evacuationCenters ?evacCount .
}
GROUP BY ?source
ORDER BY DESC(?total)

label: CQ9 — Infrastructure damage cost for Flood events in Region XIII
CQ10 — Housing damage by Meteorological events in Region VIII
CQ11 — Agriculture damage by Tropical Cyclone in Region V (Bicol)
CQ12 — Seaport disruptions caused by Tropical Cyclones
CQ13 — Airport disruptions from Geophysical events (duration in hours)
CQ14 — Class suspensions in NCR by grade level
CQ15 — Assistance provided in Isabela by source & organization
CQ16 — Declarations of Calamity in Region XII (SOCCSKSARGEN)
CQ17 — Rescue operations in Mindanao (units & equipment)
CQ18 — 4th income class municipalities in Region 9 with preemptive evacuation
CQ19 — Fire incidents: DROMIC vs. EM-DAT (CRED) counts
CQ20 — Events reported in more than one source
query:
PREFIX :     <https://sakuna.ph/>
PREFIX org:  <https://sakuna.ph/org>
PREFIX skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#>
PREFIX prov: <http://www.w3.org/ns/prov#>
PREFIX xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX qudt: <http://qudt.org/schema/qudt/>
PREFIX cur:  <http://qudt.org/vocab/currency/>

SELECT ?e1 ?eventName1 ?s1 ?d1 ?e2 ?eventName2 ?s2 ?d2
WHERE {
    ?e1 a :DisasterEvent .
    ?e2 a :DisasterEvent .
    ?e1 prov:alternateOf ?e2 .

    ?e1 prov:wasDerivedFrom/prov:wasAttributedTo ?s1 .
    ?e2 prov:wasDerivedFrom/prov:wasAttributedTo ?s2 .

    ?s1 a prov:Organization .
    ?s2 a prov:Organization .

    ?e1 :startDate ?d1 .
    ?e2 :startDate ?d2 .

    OPTIONAL { ?e1 :eventName ?eventName1 }
    OPTIONAL { ?e2 :eventName ?eventName2 }

    FILTER(STR(?e1) < STR(?e2))
}
